reviews.comment:
Muy variada la carta del menú, con sugerencias y platos para compartir. Variada bebidas y tragos, los postres frescos.
Espacio amplio comedor. El servicio de los mozos excelente, siempre atentos y sugiriendo menú.
Espacio para juegos de chicos, afuera mesas para fumadores.

(Translated by Google)
The menu is very varied, with suggestions and dishes to share. A wide selection of drinks and cocktails, and fresh desserts. Spacious dining area. Excellent service from the waiters, always attentive and offering menu suggestions. Children's play area, and outdoor tables for smokers.
